questions.question: Why does formal credit play an important role in economic development?

options.B: It provides regulated and affordable loans

questions.explanation: Formal credit is regulated by RBI and offers loans at reasonable interest rates.

questions.question: Which situation best explains a debt trap?

options.A: Borrowing at low interest and repaying easily
options.B: Borrowing repeatedly to repay old loans

questions.explanation: Debt trap occurs when a borrower keeps borrowing to repay previous loans.

questions.question: Why is collateral demanded by banks?

options.C: To secure the loan against default

questions.explanation: Collateral ensures security in case the borrower fails to repay.

questions.question: Which policy can reduce dependence on informal credit?

options.B: Expanding banking facilities in rural areas

questions.explanation: Improved access to banks reduces reliance on informal lenders.

questions.question: Why is high interest rate harmful for small borrowers?
questions.explanation: High interest increases repayment burden and may lead to debt.

questions.question: Which of the following best reflects productive credit?
questions.explanation: Productive credit generates income and improves repayment capacity.

questions.question: Why are demand deposits considered as money?

options.B: They can be withdrawn anytime and used for payments

questions.explanation: Demand deposits can be withdrawn and used via cheques.

questions.question: Which institution supervises formal credit in India?
questions.explanation: Reserve Bank of India regulates and supervises banks.

questions.question: How does credit help in economic growth?

options.B: By supporting investment and business activities

questions.explanation: Credit supports business investment and increases production.

questions.question: Which example shows exploitation in informal credit?
questions.explanation: Moneylenders often charge excessive interest rates.

questions.question: Why is financial inclusion important?

options.B: To provide banking access to all sections

questions.explanation: Financial inclusion ensures access to banking services.

questions.question: Which of the following is an example of unproductive credit?

options.C: Loan for medical emergency without income source

questions.explanation: Unproductive credit does not generate income.

questions.question: Why is modern money accepted as legal tender?

options.A: Because people trust RBI and government guarantee
options.B: Because it is made of gold

questions.explanation: People trust RBI-backed currency.

questions.question: What happens if banks do not regulate lending?
questions.explanation: Regulation prevents unfair lending practices.

questions.question: Which situation reflects secure credit?

options.B: Loan with collateral and written agreement

questions.explanation: Secured credit includes collateral and documentation.

questions.question: Why are Self Help Groups effective in rural credit?

options.B: They support members with small savings and loans

questions.explanation: SHGs pool savings and provide affordable loans.

questions.question: Which of the following reduces the risk of debt trap?
questions.explanation: Formal banks charge regulated interest rates.

questions.question: Why is documentation necessary in formal loans?
questions.explanation: Documentation ensures transparency and legal security.

questions.question: Which factor increases access to formal credit?
questions.explanation: More branches improve credit accessibility.

questions.question: Why do poor households depend on informal sources?

options.A: Easy availability and no strict requirements

questions.explanation: Informal lenders provide quick loans without strict documentation.

questions.question: Which action strengthens banking system?
questions.explanation: Supervision ensures fair practices.

questions.question: Which example shows measure of value function of money?

options.A: Comparing price of rice and wheat

questions.explanation: Money helps compare prices.

questions.question: Why is saving in banks beneficial?
questions.explanation: Bank savings are safe and earn interest.

questions.question: Which credit system is most reliable for long-term growth?
questions.explanation: Formal regulated credit ensures stability.

questions.question: Balanced credit system requires:

options.B: Equal access to affordable formal credit

questions.explanation: Affordable formal credit ensures inclusive development.
